inputs.text: A candid, slightly imperfect snapshot taken with an iPhone, showing a person’s everyday life in a natural, unposed moment. The subject is a gender‑neutral young adult wearing casual clothing—a soft, heather‑gray hoodie, faded blue jeans, and white sneakers. They are standing on a city sidewalk, one hand holding a white ceramic coffee cup, the other loosely holding a slim smartphone. The composition is slightly off‑center, as if the photographer captured the scene unintentionally. The image has a subtle motion blur, especially around the subject’s head and the moving background, giving the impression of a quick, handheld shot. Lighting is uneven and natural: soft, warm sunlight streams in from the left, casting a gentle, golden glow on the subject’s face, while the right side falls into a cooler, shaded tone from a nearby building’s shadow. A faint streetlamp glints in the background, adding a cool, bluish hue to the far side of the frame. The colors are muted and realistic—earthy tones of the hoodie and jeans, the creamy white of the coffee cup, and the muted pastel of the sky above. The background shows blurred hints of urban details—storefront windows, a line of parked bicycles, and a distant traffic light—enhancing the everyday, spontaneous feel of the photo.
